author: Lothar of Segni (Innocent III) (†1216)
title: De missarum mysteriis
editions: ed. Dahane 2022; see also D.F. Wright, A Medieval Commentary on the Mass: „Particulae” 2-3 and 5- 6 of the „De Missarum Mysteriis” (ca. 1195) of Cardinal Lothar of Segni (Pope Innocent III), Doctoral Dissertation, University of Notre Dame, 1977 (Ann Arbor, Michigan: University Microfilms); a translation of the Prologue and the section dealing with the Eucharistic Prayer (Part I, chapters 50-51; Part II, Part IV, and Part V, chapters 1-10) was submitted as a Master’s Thesis by Michael O. Brown (University of Notre Dame 1982).
